title: AAYS 114 DEM candidate classifier retry
scope: Classify AAYS 113 raster inventory rows as possible DEM/DTM versus projection/geoid grid files. Read-only. No DB writes. No production deploy. No fake elevation values. Fresh retry because heartbeat has not advanced from aays-113b-light-dem-check and AAYS-114 result is missing.
self_correction_rules: If AAYS-113 CSV is missing, produce blocker report rather than fabricating DEM candidates.
If candidates are projection/geoid grids, classify them as not DEM/DTM and do not use for elevation sampling.
If possible terrain DEM candidates are found, recommend rerunning AAYS-112 with selected candidate.
If no likely DEM is found, recommend official UK terrain DEM/DTM acquisition workflow.
